step_by_step_thinking: I agree with the previous assessment that option D (Anti Lewis) does not involve erythroblastosis fetalis primarily because this condition typically arises due to Rh factor incompatibilities rather than other blood group systems such as ABO or Lewis. The focus on Rh incompatibility makes sense given how frequently it leads to significant immune reactions during pregnancy compared to rarer conditions involving different antigenic markers like those found in the Lewis system. Therefore, my final answer remains consistent with Option D. Final
